stage_outputs.summary: Minimal admissible proposition shell with subject, relation, and object slots.
Carries one proposition shell across adjacent turns without topic collapse.
Separates user, Aurora, and external-source ownership around the same claim shell.
Attaches salience, confidence, and compression weight to proposition shells.
Chooses ask, defer, infer, or commit when branch pressure rises.
An admissible claim now persists as the same object across turns.
A claim becomes owned by a speaker/source instead of existing as anonymous content.
A boundary split can now trigger targeted repair instead of forcing immediate collapse.
An admissible claim now carries confidence and retention pressure.
A proposition becomes a tracked lineage with temporal continuity and speaker ownership.
Claim confidence now depends on both evidence strength and source ownership.
Tracked propositions can now branch, repair, retract, and reconverge.
The system can choose and preserve causal reading paths through an active proposition.
Propositions are now linked by continuity, ownership, and selected causal paths.
Full proposition substrate: claim identity, temporal continuity, provenance weighting, branching repair, and causal mesh.
